titleStmt.title: SII 26.284: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 284. (A.R. No. 269 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, and mentions his queen Bhuvanamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ. It records the gift of 90 sheep to provide ghee for nandā lamp in the temple of Tiruvālakkōyilāṇḍār of the same Tirukkachchūr, by a certain [••••]ṉ Tiruvaraṅgadēvaṉ alias Virudarājabhuyaṁkarachchōḻa-vāṇiyaṉ of Iruppākaḷakkuḍi in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is stated that the 90 sheep were divided amongst three or four persons for maintenance, who had agreed to measure out the ghee to the priests of the central shrine of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka cayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭit teṉṉavar nilaikeṭa miṉavar kulaitara vikkalar ciṅkaṇar melkaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittiluñ cakkaranaṭātti viraciṅkācaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta
ruḷiya kovirājakesaripaṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu Añcu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟakkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟak koṭṭattu Iruppākaḷakkuṭippaḷḷi ṉa tiruvara
ṅkatevaṉāṉa virutarājapuyaṅkarac coḻavāṇiyaneṉ kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭuk kaccūr tiruvālakkoyilāṇṭārkku vaitta tirunon=tāviḷakkoṉṟiṉukku vaitta cāvā(muvā)
muvāpperāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu niṉ nicatamuḻakku ney nivan=tamāka muṭṭāmai Aṭṭuvomāka sammattitu kaikkoṇṭom ma
ko karai ṉ tirumākāḷivivukku kālukku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu 2 10 2(1/2) Ayyaṉ perumāṉ civakaṉumayyaṉ perumāṉ kampaṉum kālukku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu 2 10 2(1/2)yum ta
n=ta ya ṟ kecaṉuṟum pakki ḷa karaikkālukku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu 10 1l muval niṅki peruṅkāṭaṉ U
lamāka Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟum Ivveḻuvoṅ kai
neyyuṅkoyilile tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyuṭaiyārkaḷ vacame
ṉṟu muṭṭāmai ḷantu taravukoḷḷak kaṭavomāṉomivvaṉaivom
In=tadharmmam panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
